claim: By 2030, AI coding tool revenue growth will have plateaued below 15% YoY, resembling the RPA hype cycle
reasoning: Contrarian: AI coding tools may hit a ceiling on what they can reliably automate. Like RPA in 2018-2022, initial excitement gives way to disillusionment as maintenance costs and hallucination-driven bugs accumulate. Consensus says this market grows forever.
resolution: Resolves YES if the combined revenue growth rate of the top 5 AI coding tool providers (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon CodeWhisperer or successors) falls below 15% YoY as reported in earnings calls or credible market research by end of 2030.
claim_zh: 到2030年，AI编程工具的营收增长将低于15%的同比增速，并趋于平稳，类似于RPA的炒作周期。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：AI编程工具在可靠自动化方面可能达到上限。就像2018-2022年的RPA一样，最初的兴奋会因维护成本和幻觉导致的bug积累而让位于幻灭。普遍观点认为这个市场会永远增长。
resolution_zh: 如果到2030年底，排名前五的AI编程工具提供商（GitHub Copilot、Cursor、Codeium、Tabnine、Amazon CodeWhisperer或其继任者）的合并营收同比增长率低于15%（根据财报电话会议或可靠市场研究报告），则预测为“是”。

claim: Junior developer hiring at FAANG companies will be HIGHER in 2029 than in 2024, not lower
reasoning: Contrarian: AI makes junior devs far more productive, so companies hire MORE of them at lower cost rather than fewer. The 'AI replaces juniors' narrative ignores Jevons paradox — cheaper labor input means more demand for it, not less. Consensus says junior hiring collapses.
resolution: Resolves YES if aggregate entry-level software engineering headcount at Meta, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, Google (or successors) in 2029 exceeds their 2024 levels, per LinkedIn Workforce Reports, earnings disclosures, or credible third-party analysis.
claim_zh: 到2029年，FAANG公司对初级开发者的招聘数量将高于2024年，而非更低。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：AI将大幅提高初级开发者的生产力，因此公司将以更低的成本招聘更多的初级开发者，而不是更少。“AI取代初级开发者”的说法忽略了杰文斯悖论——更便宜的劳动力投入意味着对其需求增加，而非减少。普遍观点认为初级开发者招聘将崩溃。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年，Meta、苹果、亚马逊、Netflix、谷歌（或其继任者）的初级软件工程师总人数超过2024年的水平（根据LinkedIn劳动力报告、财报披露或可靠的第三方分析），则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: SHAPR framework formalizes solo human-centric pods, reducing total headcount requirements

claim: The median salary premium for 'AI engineering' skills will fall below $10K by 2029 as AI fluency becomes table stakes
reasoning: Contrarian: When everyone can use AI tools, AI fluency stops being a differentiator and the premium collapses — just like 'internet skills' in 2005. Consensus says AI-fluent engineers command massive premiums indefinitely.
resolution: Resolves YES if Levels.fyi, Glassdoor, or a major compensation survey (n>5000) shows <$10K median total comp difference between 'AI engineer' and 'software engineer' roles at comparable experience levels by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，随着AI熟练度成为基本要求，“AI工程”技能的中位数薪资溢价将降至1万美元以下。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：当每个人都能使用AI工具时，AI熟练度就不再是差异化优势，其溢价将随之消失——就像2005年的“互联网技能”一样。普遍观点认为，精通AI的工程师将无限期地获得巨额溢价。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，Levels.fyi、Glassdoor或一项大型薪酬调查（样本量>5000）显示，在可比经验水平下，“AI工程师”和“软件工程师”职位之间的中位数总薪酬差异低于1万美元，则预测为“是”。

claim: Open-source AI models will LOSE market share in enterprise coding tools to proprietary models between 2026 and 2030
reasoning: Contrarian: Enterprises care about liability, support, and integration — not model weights. As coding agents handle more critical workflows, enterprises will pay the proprietary premium for contractual guarantees. Open-source wins the hobbyist market but loses the enterprise. Consensus says open-source inevitably wins.
resolution: Resolves YES if enterprise AI coding tool market share (by revenue) for proprietary-model-based tools exceeds their 2026 share, per Gartner, IDC, or equivalent analyst report published by 2031.
last_evidence: ByteDance's open-source Deer-flow acts as a powerful counterbalance to proprietary models, giving enterprises alternatives to API lock-in.
claim_zh: 在2026年至2030年间，开源AI模型在企业级编程工具市场的份额将输给专有模型。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：企业关注的是责任、支持和集成，而非模型权重。随着编程代理处理更关键的工作流程，企业将为合同保障支付专有模型的溢价。开源模型将赢得爱好者市场，但会失去企业市场。普遍观点认为开源模型必将获胜。
resolution_zh: 如果到2031年发布的Gartner、IDC或同等分析师报告显示，基于专有模型的企业AI编程工具的市场份额（按营收计算）超过其2026年的份额，则预测为“是”。

claim: AI-generated code will have a LOWER average CVE density than human-written code by 2029
reasoning: Contrarian: AI models trained on vulnerability databases will internalize secure patterns faster than humans learn them. The 'AI code is insecure' narrative is based on 2023-2025 benchmarks; models improve while human error rates stay constant. Consensus says AI makes code less secure.
resolution: Resolves YES if a peer-reviewed study or major security vendor report (Snyk, Veracode, Synopsys) finds AI-generated code has fewer CVEs per KLOC than human-written code in equivalent production codebases by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，AI生成的代码的平均CVE密度将低于人类编写的代码。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：经过漏洞数据库训练的AI模型将比人类更快地内化安全模式。“AI代码不安全”的说法基于2023-2025年的基准测试；模型在不断改进，而人类的错误率保持不变。普遍观点认为AI会降低代码的安全性。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，一项同行评审研究或主要安全供应商报告（Snyk、Veracode、Synopsys）发现，在同等生产代码库中，AI生成的代码每千行代码的CVE数量少于人类编写的代码，则预测为“是”。

claim: Total global software developer headcount will be HIGHER in 2030 than in 2025
reasoning: Contrarian: Every wave of developer productivity tools (compilers, IDEs, cloud, open-source) has increased total developer employment. AI is a productivity multiplier, not a replacement. More software gets built, creating more jobs. Consensus says mass developer unemployment.
resolution: Resolves YES if Bureau of Labor Statistics (US), Eurostat, or a credible global estimate (Evans Data, Statista) shows total software developer employment in 2030 exceeding 2025 levels.
claim_zh: 到2030年，全球软件开发者总人数将高于2025年。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：每一波开发者生产力工具（编译器、IDE、云、开源）都增加了开发者总就业人数。AI是生产力乘数，而非替代品。更多的软件将被构建，从而创造更多就业机会。普遍观点认为开发者将面临大规模失业。
resolution_zh: 如果美国劳工统计局（BLS）、欧盟统计局（Eurostat）或可靠的全球估算（Evans Data、Statista）显示，2030年软件开发者总就业人数超过2025年的水平，则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: SHAPR framework crystallizes the shift toward solo human-centric teams, radically reducing total headcount needs

claim: By 2028, at least 3 major companies will have publicly rolled back autonomous AI coding agent deployments due to quality/cost issues
reasoning: Contrarian: Autonomous agents sound great in demos but create unmaintainable code at scale. Technical debt from AI-generated code will force high-profile rollbacks, similar to microservices backlash. Consensus says autonomous agents only expand from here.
resolution: Resolves YES if 3+ companies with >1000 engineers publicly announce scaling back, pausing, or discontinuing autonomous AI coding agent programs, documented in press releases, blog posts, or credible journalism by end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年，至少有3家大公司将因质量/成本问题公开撤回自主AI编程代理的部署。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：自主代理在演示中听起来很棒，但在规模化应用中会产生难以维护的代码。AI生成的代码带来的技术债务将迫使知名公司撤回部署，类似于微服务引发的反弹。普遍观点认为自主代理将持续扩张。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，有3家以上拥有超过1000名工程师的公司公开宣布缩减、暂停或终止自主AI编程代理项目，并有新闻稿、博客文章或可靠新闻报道为证，则预测为“是”。

claim: China will produce the leading AI coding tool by market share outside the US by 2029
reasoning: Contrarian: DeepSeek, Alibaba, and ByteDance are investing massively in code models. China has more developers than the US. Export controls push China to build independent tooling that captures the non-US market. Consensus focuses exclusively on US-based tools.
resolution: Resolves YES if a Chinese-origin AI coding tool (by a China-headquartered company) holds the largest market share by MAU or revenue in any 3+ non-US countries with >100K developers, per credible analyst report by end of 2029.
last_evidence: Cursor secretly leveraging Moonshot AI's Kimi validates the rapid advancement and competitive viability of Chinese foundation models in the coding space.
claim_zh: 到2029年，中国将在美国以外的市场份额中生产出领先的AI编程工具。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：DeepSeek、阿里巴巴和字节跳动正在代码模型上进行大规模投资。中国的开发者数量超过美国。出口管制促使中国构建独立的工具，以占领非美国市场。普遍观点只关注美国的工具。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，根据可靠的分析师报告，一款中国起源的AI编程工具（由总部位于中国的公司开发）在任何3个以上拥有超过10万开发者的非美国国家中，按月活跃用户（MAU）或营收计算，占据最大的市场份额，则预测为“是”。

claim: Natural language will NOT replace code as the primary software specification medium by 2032
reasoning: Contrarian to the contrarians: despite AI hype, natural language is fundamentally ambiguous. Formal languages exist because precision matters. Engineers will still write code — just different code (prompts-as-code, constraint specs, test harnesses). The 'end of programming' narrative is wrong. Consensus says natural language replaces code.
resolution: Resolves YES if >50% of production software artifacts at Fortune 500 companies are still primarily specified in formal programming languages (not natural language prompts) as of 2032, per developer surveys or enterprise tooling reports.
claim_zh: 到2032年，自然语言将不会取代代码成为主要的软件规范介质。
reasoning_zh: 反向中的反向观点：尽管有AI炒作，但自然语言本质上是模糊的。形式语言之所以存在，是因为精确性很重要。工程师仍将编写代码——只是不同类型的代码（如“提示即代码”、约束规范、测试工具）。“编程终结”的说法是错误的。普遍观点认为自然语言将取代代码。
resolution_zh: 如果到2032年，根据开发者调查或企业工具报告，财富500强公司超过50%的生产软件制品仍主要通过形式化编程语言（而非自然语言提示）进行规范，则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: NLAHs successfully replace runtime controller code with editable natural language contracts

claim: The 'vibe coding' movement will produce a mass wave of catastrophic production failures by 2028, triggering regulatory intervention
reasoning: Contrarian: Non-engineers using AI to build production systems they do not understand will cause failures in healthcare, finance, or infrastructure. This triggers a backlash — professional licensing for software, mandatory code audits, or AI-code liability laws. Consensus says vibe coding democratizes development harmlessly.
resolution: Resolves YES if any G7 country passes legislation or regulatory rule specifically addressing AI-generated code quality, liability, or mandatory review requirements by end of 2028.
last_evidence: Kitchen Loop demonstrates 1,094+ automated pull requests with zero regressions via strict automated verification
claim_zh: 到2028年，“凭感觉编程”（vibe coding）运动将导致大规模灾难性生产故障，从而引发监管干预。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：非工程师使用AI构建他们不理解的生产系统，将在医疗、金融或基础设施领域造成故障。这将引发反弹——软件专业许可、强制代码审计或AI代码责任法。普遍观点认为“凭感觉编程”无害地实现了开发的民主化。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，任何G7国家通过专门针对AI生成代码质量、责任或强制审查要求的立法或监管规定，则预测为“是”。

claim: Cursor, the company, will not exist as an independent entity by 2028 (acquired or defunct)
reasoning: Contrarian: IDE-layer AI tools are a thin wrapper over foundation models. When model providers ship native IDE features (which they already are), standalone AI IDE companies get squeezed. Cursor's $50B valuation is the peak, not the floor. Consensus says Cursor becomes the next big platform.
resolution: Resolves YES if Anysphere (Cursor's parent) is acquired by another company, merges, or ceases operations by end of 2028. Resolves NO if it remains independent and operational.
last_evidence: Cursor's reliance on a Chinese foundation model invites intense regulatory and enterprise security scrutiny, potentially destabilizing the company's enterprise revenue.
claim_zh: 到2028年，Cursor公司将不再作为独立实体存在（被收购或倒闭）。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：IDE层面的AI工具只是基础模型的一个薄薄的封装。当模型提供商推出原生IDE功能时（他们已经在这样做了），独立的AI IDE公司将面临挤压。Cursor的500亿美元估值是巅峰，而非谷底。普遍观点认为Cursor将成为下一个大型平台。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，Anysphere（Cursor的母公司）被其他公司收购、合并或停止运营，则预测为“是”。如果它保持独立运营，则预测为“否”。

claim: By 2030, >30% of professional developers will primarily use AI tools from a NON-US company (DeepSeek, Mistral, etc.)
reasoning: Contrarian: US dominance in AI tooling is not guaranteed. DeepSeek R1 already matches frontier US models at a fraction of the cost. European and Asian developers may prefer local alternatives for sovereignty, cost, and latency reasons. Consensus assumes US tools win globally.
resolution: Resolves YES if a global developer survey (n>10000) or credible market analysis shows >30% of professional developers primarily using AI coding tools built by non-US-headquartered companies by end of 2030.
last_evidence: The revelation that a leading US-based coding tool is quietly powered by a non-US (Chinese) model directly advances the adoption curve of international models.
claim_zh: 到2030年，超过30%的专业开发者将主要使用非美国公司（如DeepSeek、Mistral等）的AI工具。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：美国在AI工具领域的独霸地位并非板上钉钉。DeepSeek R1已经以极低的成本与前沿的美国模型相媲美。欧洲和亚洲的开发者可能出于主权、成本和延迟等原因更倾向于本地替代方案。普遍观点认为美国工具将赢得全球市场。
resolution_zh: 如果到2030年底，一项全球开发者调查（样本量>10000）或可靠的市场分析显示，超过30%的专业开发者主要使用由非美国总部公司开发的AI编程工具，则预测为“是”。

claim: The senior engineer shortage narrative will prove wrong: AI will make senior-level judgment MORE accessible, not scarcer, by 2030
reasoning: Contrarian: AI doesn't just replace junior work — it codifies senior patterns. Architecture review, system design, and debugging heuristics get embedded in AI tools, democratizing expertise. The shortage never materializes because AI fills the gap. Consensus says senior engineers become the bottleneck.
resolution: Resolves YES if 'senior software engineer' roles do NOT appear in the top 10 hardest-to-fill tech positions in Hays, Robert Half, or equivalent staffing firm reports for 2029 or 2030.
last_evidence: OpenAI doubling its workforce to support an enterprise push signals that demand for top-tier talent and senior-level judgment remains exceptionally strong, rather than becoming less scarce.
claim_zh: 高级工程师短缺的说法将被证明是错误的：到2030年，AI将使高级别的判断力更容易获得，而非更稀缺。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：AI不仅取代初级工作，它还规范了高级模式。架构评审、系统设计和调试启发式方法被嵌入到AI工具中，从而使专业知识民主化。短缺永远不会出现，因为AI填补了空白。普遍观点认为高级工程师将成为瓶颈。
resolution_zh: 如果在Hays、Robert Half或同等招聘公司2029年或2030年的报告中，“高级软件工程师”职位未出现在最难填补的十大技术职位之列，则预测为“是”。

claim: At least one major AI lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind) will suffer a sustained >6 month plateau in coding benchmark performance before 2028
reasoning: Contrarian: Scaling laws have limits. Training data for code is finite. The next jump in coding ability may require architectural breakthroughs that don't arrive on schedule. A plateau would deflate the entire 'AI replaces programmers' narrative. Consensus says capabilities only go up.
resolution: Resolves YES if any top-3 AI lab's flagship model shows <2% improvement on SWE-bench, HumanEval, or equivalent coding benchmarks across two consecutive major model releases spanning >6 months, before end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年之前，至少一家主要AI实验室（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind）的编程基准性能将经历持续超过6个月的停滞期。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：扩展定律有其局限性。代码的训练数据是有限的。编程能力的下一次飞跃可能需要架构上的突破，而这些突破可能不会按时到来。停滞期将削弱整个“AI取代程序员”的说法。普遍观点认为能力只会不断提升。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底之前，任何排名前三的AI实验室的旗舰模型在两次连续的主要模型发布（间隔超过6个月）中，在SWE-bench、HumanEval或同等编程基准测试上的改进低于2%，则预测为“是”。

claim: The biggest winner from AI coding tools by 2030 will be non-tech companies (banks, manufacturers, retailers), not tech companies
reasoning: Contrarian: Tech companies already have great developers. AI coding tools give the biggest marginal improvement to companies with weak engineering orgs — banks building internal tools, manufacturers automating supply chains, retailers customizing e-commerce. The productivity gain accrues to the laggards, not the leaders. Consensus focuses on how AI helps Silicon Valley.
resolution: Resolves YES if McKinsey, BCG, or equivalent consultancy publishes analysis showing non-tech-sector companies captured more economic value (cost savings + revenue) from AI coding tools than tech-sector companies by 2030.
claim_zh: 到2030年，AI编程工具的最大受益者将是非科技公司（银行、制造商、零售商），而非科技公司。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：科技公司已经拥有优秀的开发者。AI编程工具对工程组织薄弱的公司（如构建内部工具的银行、自动化供应链的制造商、定制电子商务的零售商）带来最大的边际改进。生产力提升将惠及落后者，而非领导者。普遍观点关注AI如何帮助硅谷。
resolution_zh: 如果麦肯锡、波士顿咨询公司（BCG）或同等咨询公司发布分析报告显示，到2030年，非科技行业的公司从AI编程工具中获得的经济价值（成本节约+营收）超过科技行业的公司，则预测为“是”。

claim: By end of 2027, GitHub Copilot will lose its #1 market share position in AI coding assistants to a competitor
reasoning: Copilot has first-mover advantage and deep GitHub integration, but Cursor, Claude Code, and others are rapidly gaining ground. The market is fragmenting — yet GitHub's enterprise lock-in and Microsoft's distribution remain formidable.
resolution: Resolves YES if any single competitor surpasses GitHub Copilot in monthly active paid users or revenue by end of 2027, per GitHub earnings, competitor disclosures, or credible analyst estimates (Gartner, IDC).
claim_zh: 到2027年底，GitHub Copilot将在AI编程助手市场中失去其第一的市场份额位置，被竞争对手超越。
reasoning_zh: Copilot拥有先发优势和深度GitHub集成，但Cursor、Claude Code等竞争对手正在迅速崛起。市场正在碎片化——然而GitHub的企业锁定和微软的分销能力依然强大。
resolution_zh: 如果到2027年底，根据GitHub财报、竞争对手披露或可靠的分析师估算（Gartner、IDC），任何单一竞争对手在月活跃付费用户或营收方面超越GitHub Copilot，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2029, >60% of new production code at Fortune 500 companies will be initially generated by AI and then reviewed by humans
reasoning: The AI-first workflow is already standard at many tech companies. As AI coding tools improve and enterprises adopt them, the generate-then-review pattern will become dominant for routine code. Enterprise inertia slows adoption but doesn't stop it.
resolution: Resolves YES if a major developer survey (Stack Overflow, JetBrains, or GitHub) reports >60% of Fortune 500 enterprise respondents say AI generates the initial draft for the majority of their new code, by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，财富500强公司超过60%的新生产代码将首先由AI生成，然后由人类审查。
reasoning_zh: AI优先的工作流程在许多科技公司已成为标准。随着AI编程工具的改进和企业对其的采用，先生成后审查的模式将成为常规代码的主导方式。企业惯性会减缓采用速度，但不会阻止它。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，一项主要的开发者调查（Stack Overflow、JetBrains或GitHub）报告显示，超过60%的财富500强企业受访者表示，他们大部分新代码的初始草稿由AI生成，则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: Kitchen Loop strongly validates spec-driven, zero-authoring code generation scaling into production

claim: At least one AI coding tool will achieve >90% on SWE-bench Verified by end of 2026
reasoning: Progress on SWE-bench has been rapid — from ~2% in early 2024 to over 70% by early 2026. With agentic scaffolding improvements and better models, the 90% threshold is within reach in the near term.
resolution: Resolves YES if any AI coding system (model + scaffolding) scores >90% on SWE-bench Verified leaderboard with a publicly documented submission by December 31, 2026.
claim_zh: 到2026年底，至少一款AI编程工具将在SWE-bench Verified基准测试中达到90%以上的得分。
reasoning_zh: SWE-bench的进展迅速——从2024年初的约2%到2026年初的超过70%。随着代理脚手架的改进和更好的模型，90%的门槛在短期内触手可及。
resolution_zh: 如果到2026年12月31日，任何AI编程系统（模型+脚手架）在SWE-bench Verified排行榜上以公开记录的提交获得超过90%的得分，则预测为“是”。

claim: The AI coding tool market will see a major consolidation wave: 5+ funded startups (>$10M raised) will shut down or be acqui-hired by end of 2027
reasoning: The market is overcrowded with AI coding startups competing on thin differentiation. As foundation model providers bundle coding features, standalone tools face margin compression. This pattern has played out in every enterprise SaaS wave.
resolution: Resolves YES if 5+ AI coding tool startups that raised >$10M in venture funding announce shutdown, acqui-hire, or fire sale (acquisition at <1x total funding) by end of 2027, per Crunchbase or PitchBook data.
claim_zh: AI编程工具市场将出现一波大规模整合：到2027年底，5家以上获得融资（融资额超过1000万美元）的初创公司将倒闭或被“人才收购”。
reasoning_zh: AI编程初创公司市场过度拥挤，它们之间的差异化很小。随着基础模型提供商捆绑编程功能，独立的工具将面临利润压缩。这种模式在每一波企业SaaS浪潮中都曾出现。
resolution_zh: 如果到2027年底，根据Crunchbase或PitchBook数据，有5家以上获得超过1000万美元风险投资的AI编程工具初创公司宣布倒闭、“人才收购”或贱卖（收购价格低于总融资额的1倍），则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2030, the role title 'prompt engineer' will appear in fewer than 1% of software job postings, having been absorbed into standard engineering roles
reasoning: Prompt engineering is becoming a universal skill rather than a specialization. As AI tools improve at interpreting intent, explicit prompt crafting becomes less important. The standalone role is already declining in job boards.
resolution: Resolves YES if 'prompt engineer' (as a distinct job title, not mentioned in requirements) constitutes <1% of software engineering job postings on LinkedIn, Indeed, or Glassdoor by end of 2030.
claim_zh: 到2030年，“提示工程师”这一职位名称将出现在不到1%的软件招聘信息中，并已被吸收到标准工程职位中。
reasoning_zh: 提示工程正成为一种通用技能，而非专业化领域。随着AI工具在理解意图方面的改进，明确的提示词编写变得不那么重要。独立职位在招聘网站上已经呈现下降趋势。
resolution_zh: 如果到2030年底，“提示工程师”（作为一个独立的职位名称，而非要求中提及的技能）在LinkedIn、Indeed或Glassdoor上的软件工程招聘信息中占比低于1%，则预测为“是”。

claim: India will surpass the US in absolute number of developers actively using AI coding tools by end of 2028
reasoning: India already has more GitHub users than the US. AI coding tools are especially valuable for developers who learned English as a second language. Free tiers and lower-cost alternatives will drive massive adoption in India's enormous developer population.
resolution: Resolves YES if a credible survey or platform data (GitHub, JetBrains, Stack Overflow) shows India has more developers regularly using AI coding tools than the US by end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年底，印度在活跃使用AI编程工具的开发者绝对数量上将超过美国。
reasoning_zh: 印度已经拥有比美国更多的GitHub用户。AI编程工具对于将英语作为第二语言的开发者尤其有价值。免费层级和低成本替代方案将推动AI工具在印度庞大的开发者群体中大规模普及。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，一项可靠的调查或平台数据（GitHub、JetBrains、Stack Overflow）显示，印度经常使用AI编程工具的开发者数量多于美国，则预测为“是”。

claim: The 'AI software engineer' job title will be among the top 5 fastest-growing tech roles in the US by 2028
reasoning: Companies need engineers who can build, evaluate, and maintain AI systems — not just use them. This hybrid role combining ML engineering with software engineering is already proliferating at major tech companies.
resolution: Resolves YES if 'AI software engineer' or equivalent title appears in the top 5 fastest-growing tech job categories per LinkedIn's annual Jobs on the Rise report, BLS data, or Glassdoor's analysis for any year through 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年，“AI软件工程师”这一职位名称将成为美国增长最快的五大技术职位之一。
reasoning_zh: 公司需要能够构建、评估和维护AI系统，而不仅仅是使用它们的工程师。这种结合了机器学习工程和软件工程的混合角色已经在主要科技公司中迅速普及。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年的任何一年，LinkedIn年度“崛起中的职业”报告、BLS数据或Glassdoor的分析显示，“AI软件工程师”或同等职位出现在增长最快的前五大技术职位类别中，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2030, the bottom quartile of software developer salaries (adjusted for inflation) will be LOWER than 2025 levels in the US
reasoning: AI tools commoditize routine coding work. While top engineers see pay increases, the floor drops as more people can do basic development. This mirrors what happened to web design salaries after template builders emerged.
resolution: Resolves YES if BLS Occupational Employment Statistics or a major comp survey shows the 25th percentile of US software developer total compensation (inflation-adjusted to 2025 dollars) is lower in 2030 than in 2025.
claim_zh: 到2030年，美国软件开发者薪资的最低四分位数（经通胀调整后）将低于2025年的水平。
reasoning_zh: AI工具将常规编程工作商品化。虽然顶级工程师的薪资有所增长，但随着更多人能够进行基础开发，薪资的底线会下降。这与模板构建器出现后网页设计薪资的变化如出一辙。
resolution_zh: 如果美国劳工统计局（BLS）职业就业统计数据或一项主要薪酬调查显示，2030年美国软件开发者总薪酬的第25百分位数（按2025年美元通胀调整后）低于2025年的水平，则预测为“是”。

claim: Staff+ engineer compensation at top tech companies will increase by >20% in real terms between 2025 and 2030
reasoning: As AI handles more routine work, the premium on system design, cross-team coordination, and architectural judgment increases. Companies will pay more for the engineers who can direct AI-augmented teams and make high-stakes technical decisions.
resolution: Resolves YES if Levels.fyi data shows median total compensation for Staff/Principal engineers at FAANG-tier companies in 2030 is >20% higher in real terms (CPI-adjusted) than 2025 levels.
claim_zh: 在2025年至2030年间，顶级科技公司的Staff+级别工程师薪酬将实际增长超过20%。
reasoning_zh: 随着AI处理更多常规工作，对系统设计、跨团队协作和架构判断力的需求溢价将增加。公司将为那些能够指导AI增强团队并做出高风险技术决策的工程师支付更高的薪酬。
resolution_zh: 如果Levels.fyi数据显示，2030年FAANG级别公司Staff/Principal工程师的中位数总薪酬实际（经CPI调整后）比2025年水平高出20%以上，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2029, freelance developer hourly rates on Upwork/Toptal for routine web development will drop below $25/hr globally (from ~$50+ in 2025)
reasoning: AI tools dramatically lower the skill floor for routine web development, expanding the supply of people who can deliver basic projects. Platform data already shows rate compression in commodity coding categories. But complex work may sustain premium rates.
resolution: Resolves YES if the median hourly rate for 'web development' category on Upwork or Toptal falls below $25/hr for the majority of quarters in 2029, per platform data or freelancer surveys.
claim_zh: 到2029年，Upwork/Toptal上常规网页开发的自由职业者时薪将在全球范围内降至25美元/小时以下（2025年约为50美元/小时以上）。
reasoning_zh: AI工具极大地降低了常规网页开发的技能门槛，扩大了能够交付基础项目的人员供应。平台数据已经显示商品化编程类别的费率正在压缩。但复杂工作可能会维持高费率。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年大部分季度，Upwork或Toptal上“网页开发”类别的中位数时薪根据平台数据或自由职业者调查降至25美元/小时以下，则预测为“是”。

claim: A major AI-generated code vulnerability will cause a breach affecting >10 million users by end of 2027
reasoning: As AI generates more production code with less human review, the attack surface expands. AI tends to reproduce common vulnerability patterns from training data. The sheer volume of AI-generated code makes a large-scale breach statistically likely.
resolution: Resolves YES if a data breach affecting >10M users is attributed primarily to a vulnerability in AI-generated code, per post-mortem analysis, CVE reports, or investigative journalism by end of 2027.
claim_zh: 到2027年底，一个主要的AI生成代码漏洞将导致影响超过1000万用户的泄露事件。
reasoning_zh: 随着AI生成更多生产代码且人工审查减少，攻击面将扩大。AI倾向于从训练数据中复制常见的漏洞模式。AI生成代码的巨大体量使得大规模泄露在统计学上成为可能。
resolution_zh: 如果到2027年底，根据事后分析、CVE报告或调查性新闻，一起影响超过1000万用户的数据泄露事件主要归因于AI生成代码中的漏洞，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2028, >50% of enterprise SAST/DAST tools will have AI-code-specific scanning rules as a standard feature
reasoning: The security industry always follows the market. As AI-generated code proliferates, security vendors are already adding AI-specific detectors. This is a natural evolution, not a bold prediction — it's already happening at vendors like Snyk and Semgrep.
resolution: Resolves YES if >50% of the top 10 SAST/DAST tools by market share (per Gartner Magic Quadrant or Forrester Wave) include AI-generated code detection features in their standard product by end of 2028.
last_evidence: Autonomous penetration testing agents like pentagi are emerging rapidly, forcing enterprise vendors to integrate AI-native countermeasures.
claim_zh: 到2028年，超过50%的企业SAST/DAST工具将把AI代码专用扫描规则作为标准功能。
reasoning_zh: 安全行业总是紧随市场。随着AI生成代码的普及，安全供应商已在添加AI专用检测器。这是一个自然演进，而非大胆预测——Snyk和Semgrep等供应商已在实施。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，根据Gartner魔力象限或Forrester Wave报告，市场份额前十的SAST/DAST工具中超过50%在其标准产品中包含AI生成代码检测功能，则预测为“是”。

claim: Prompt injection attacks targeting AI coding agents will become a new OWASP Top 10 category by 2028
reasoning: As AI agents gain code execution capabilities and access to production environments, prompt injection becomes a critical attack vector. OWASP has already flagged LLM-specific risks, but coding agent exploitation is an emerging subcategory that may earn top-level recognition.
resolution: Resolves YES if OWASP Top 10 (web or a new AI-specific list that gains equivalent industry adoption) includes a category specifically addressing prompt injection or manipulation of AI coding agents by end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年，针对AI编码代理的提示注入攻击将成为OWASP十大安全风险中的一个新类别。
reasoning_zh: 随着AI代理获得代码执行能力并访问生产环境，提示注入成为一个关键的攻击向量。OWASP已标记了LLM特有的风险，但编码代理漏洞利用是一个新兴的子类别，可能获得顶级认可。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，OWASP十大安全风险（无论是Web应用列表还是获得同等行业认可的AI专用列表）包含一个专门针对AI编码代理的提示注入或操纵的类别，则预测为“是”。

claim: Fully automated AI test generation will cover >80% of test cases for new features at early-adopter companies by 2028
reasoning: AI is strong at generating unit tests from code, but integration and end-to-end tests require deep domain understanding. Early adopters will achieve high coverage for unit tests while integration testing remains largely human-driven, keeping overall averages below 80%.
resolution: Resolves YES if a peer-reviewed study, conference paper (ICSE, FSE), or major company tech blog documents >80% of test cases being auto-generated by AI for new feature development at a company with >500 engineers, by end of 2028.
last_evidence: Kitchen Loop framework operationalizes 'Unbeatable Tests', validating completely automated testing
claim_zh: 到2028年，在早期采用AI的公司中，AI全自动测试生成将覆盖新功能超过80%的测试用例。
reasoning_zh: AI在从代码生成单元测试方面表现出色，但集成测试和端到端测试需要深入的领域理解。早期采用者将实现单元测试的高覆盖率，而集成测试仍主要由人工驱动，使总体平均水平低于80%。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，一项同行评审研究、会议论文（如ICSE, FSE）或大型公司技术博客记录显示，在拥有超过500名工程师的公司中，AI为新功能开发自动生成了超过80%的测试用例，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2029, AI-driven continuous deployment pipelines will autonomously ship >40% of production changes at cloud-native companies without human approval
reasoning: Fully autonomous deployment requires trust in AI-generated tests, rollback mechanisms, and anomaly detection. While the technology exists in pieces, organizational risk aversion and compliance requirements will slow adoption beyond low-risk changes.
resolution: Resolves YES if credible reporting or company disclosures show >40% of production deployments at 3+ companies with >1000 engineers are fully autonomous (no human in the loop) by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，云原生公司中，AI驱动的持续部署流水线将无需人工批准，自主发布超过40%的生产变更。
reasoning_zh: 全自主部署需要对AI生成的测试、回滚机制和异常检测有充分信任。尽管技术已零散存在，但组织的风险规避和合规性要求将减缓其在低风险变更之外的采用速度。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，可靠报告或公司披露显示，在3家以上拥有超过1000名工程师的公司中，超过40%的生产部署是完全自主的（无需人工干预），则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: Kitchen Loop autonomously merged 1,094+ pull requests with zero regressions, validating autonomous CI/CD pipelines

claim: AI code review tools will catch >50% of bugs that currently escape human code review, as measured in controlled studies, by end of 2027
reasoning: AI code review is improving rapidly and doesn't suffer from reviewer fatigue or social pressure to approve. Multiple startups and incumbents are investing heavily. The controlled study evidence is beginning to accumulate.
resolution: Resolves YES if a peer-reviewed study or credible industry report shows AI code review catching >50% of bugs that escaped human review in a controlled experiment with >100 PRs by end of 2027.
claim_zh: 到2027年底，根据对照研究测量，AI代码审查工具将捕获超过50%目前人工代码审查遗漏的错误。
reasoning_zh: AI代码审查正在迅速改进，且不受审查者疲劳或批准的社会压力的影响。多家初创公司和现有企业都在大力投资。对照研究的证据已开始积累。
resolution_zh: 如果到2027年底，一项同行评审研究或可靠的行业报告显示，在包含超过100个拉取请求的对照实验中，AI代码审查捕获了超过50%人工审查遗漏的错误，则预测为“是”。

claim: Pair programming between humans will decline by >50% at companies that adopt AI coding assistants, by 2028
reasoning: AI assistants serve as always-available pair programmers. Why schedule synchronous pairing sessions when you can iterate with an AI? But some teams value pair programming for mentorship and knowledge sharing, which AI cannot fully replace.
resolution: Resolves YES if a developer survey or workplace study (n>500) at AI-adopting companies shows self-reported pair programming frequency dropping >50% compared to pre-AI-adoption levels by end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年，在采用AI编码助手的公司中，人类之间的结对编程将下降超过50%。
reasoning_zh: AI助手可以作为随时可用的结对程序员。当你可以与AI迭代时，为何还要安排同步的结对编程会话？但有些团队重视结对编程的指导和知识共享价值，这是AI无法完全取代的。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，在采用AI的公司中进行的一项开发者调查或工作场所研究（样本量n>500）显示，自我报告的结对编程频率相比AI采用前水平下降超过50%，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2028, the average time from idea to deployed MVP will drop below 1 week for solo developers using AI tools, down from 4-8 weeks in 2024
reasoning: AI tools already enable rapid prototyping. Combining code generation, design tools, and deployment automation, solo developers can ship MVPs dramatically faster. This is already happening for simple apps; the trend will extend to more complex projects.
resolution: Resolves YES if a credible developer survey or platform data (e.g., Vercel, Replit, or Heroku analytics) shows median time from project start to production deployment is <7 days for solo AI-assisted projects by end of 2028.
last_evidence: SHAPR framework models single humans managing arrays of agents, radically accelerating solo development timelines
claim_zh: 到2028年，使用AI工具的独立开发者从想法到部署MVP的平均时间将降至1周以下，而2024年为4-8周。
reasoning_zh: AI工具已能实现快速原型开发。结合代码生成、设计工具和部署自动化，独立开发者可以显著加快MVP的发布速度。这已在简单应用中发生；这一趋势将扩展到更复杂的项目。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，一项可靠的开发者调查或平台数据（例如Vercel、Replit或Heroku分析）显示，AI辅助的独立项目从启动到生产部署的中位时间少于7天，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2029, the majority of developers will spend more time specifying requirements and reviewing outputs than writing code directly
reasoning: The developer role is shifting from writing code to directing AI code generation. As AI handles more implementation, the bottleneck moves to clear specification and quality review. This is the natural evolution of the AI-assisted workflow.
resolution: Resolves YES if a major developer survey (JetBrains, Stack Overflow, or GitHub) reports >50% of respondents spend more time on requirements/review than direct code writing by end of 2029.
last_evidence: Landmark validation proves the future of engineering lies in defining the specification surface rather than authoring syntax
claim_zh: 到2029年，大多数开发者将把更多时间花在需求规范和输出审查上，而非直接编写代码。
reasoning_zh: 开发者角色正在从编写代码转向指导AI代码生成。随着AI处理更多实现工作，瓶颈转移到清晰的需求规范和质量审查。这是AI辅助工作流程的自然演变。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，一项主要的开发者调查（如JetBrains、Stack Overflow或GitHub）报告显示，超过50%的受访者花在需求/审查上的时间多于直接编写代码的时间，则预测为“是”。

claim: Computer science degree enrollment in the US will decline >15% from 2025 peak levels by 2029
reasoning: The narrative that AI replaces programmers may deter students from CS programs. However, CS degrees have survived every previous 'coding is dead' scare, and the field's breadth (ML, systems, security) provides resilience beyond just coding.
resolution: Resolves YES if NCES (National Center for Education Statistics) or CRA Taulbee Survey data shows US CS degree enrollment in 2029 is >15% below the 2025 level.
claim_zh: 到2029年，美国计算机科学学位入学人数将比2025年的峰值水平下降超过15%。
reasoning_zh: AI取代程序员的说法可能会劝退学生选择计算机科学专业。然而，计算机科学学位已挺过所有之前的“编程已死”恐慌，且该领域的广度（机器学习、系统、安全）提供了超越单纯编程的韧性。
resolution_zh: 如果NCES（美国国家教育统计中心）或CRA Taulbee调查数据显示，2029年美国计算机科学学位入学人数比2025年水平下降超过15%，则预测为“是”。

claim: Systems programming skills (Rust, C++, kernel development) will command a HIGHER salary premium relative to web development by 2030 than in 2025
reasoning: AI is better at generating high-level web code than low-level systems code. Performance-critical, safety-critical, and hardware-adjacent programming requires deep understanding that AI struggles to replicate. Supply of systems programmers stays tight while demand grows.
resolution: Resolves YES if Levels.fyi, Stack Overflow survey, or BLS data shows the ratio of systems programming salaries to web development salaries in 2030 exceeds the 2025 ratio by any margin.
claim_zh: 到2030年，系统编程技能（Rust、C++、内核开发）相对于Web开发而言，其薪资溢价将高于2025年。
reasoning_zh: AI在生成高级Web代码方面优于低级系统代码。性能关键、安全关键和硬件相关编程需要AI难以复制的深入理解。系统程序员的供应保持紧张，而需求则在增长。
resolution_zh: 如果Levels.fyi、Stack Overflow调查或BLS数据显示，2030年系统编程薪资与Web开发薪资之比以任何幅度超过2025年的比率，则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: General-purpose agents successfully optimizing hardware designs erodes the premium on hyper-specialized syntax knowledge

claim: By 2028, bootcamp graduates using AI tools will perform comparably to CS degree holders in their first year of employment, closing the historical gap
reasoning: Contrarian: AI tools compensate for gaps in theoretical knowledge by providing on-demand expertise. The practical skills bootcamps teach become more valuable when AI handles the CS fundamentals. But companies may still prefer degrees as a signal. Consensus says the degree gap remains important.
resolution: Resolves YES if a study (n>200) comparing bootcamp vs CS degree hires at comparable companies finds <10% difference in performance reviews, promotion rates, or productivity metrics in the first year, published by end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年，使用AI工具的训练营毕业生在入职第一年的表现将与计算机科学学位持有者相当，从而弥合历史差距。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：AI工具通过提供按需专业知识来弥补理论知识的不足。当AI处理计算机科学基础知识时，训练营教授的实践技能变得更有价值。但公司可能仍倾向于将学位作为一种信号。普遍共识认为学位差距仍然重要。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底发布的一项研究（样本量n>200）比较了同类公司中训练营毕业生与计算机科学学位持有者的招聘情况，发现他们在入职第一年的绩效评估、晋升率或生产力指标上的差异小于10%，则预测为“是”。

claim: The combined valuation of pure-play AI coding tool companies will exceed $200B by end of 2027
reasoning: Contrarian: Current valuations (Cursor at ~$50B) are already stretched. If the AI coding market consolidates, some players fail, and growth slows, the $200B aggregate may be a ceiling rather than a floor. Consensus says this market is just getting started.
resolution: Resolves YES if the total post-money valuation (or market cap for public companies) of companies deriving >50% of revenue from AI coding tools exceeds $200B by end of 2027, per PitchBook, Crunchbase, or public market data.
last_evidence: Cursor alone reportedly hitting a $50 billion valuation puts pure-play AI coding companies well on track to exceed $200B collectively.
claim_zh: 到2027年底，纯粹的AI编码工具公司的总估值将超过2000亿美元。
reasoning_zh: 反向观点：当前估值（例如Cursor约为500亿美元）已经过高。如果AI编码市场整合，一些参与者失败，增长放缓，2000亿美元的总估值可能是一个上限而非下限。普遍共识认为这个市场才刚刚开始。
resolution_zh: 如果到2027年底，根据PitchBook、Crunchbase或公开市场数据，从AI编码工具获得超过50%收入的公司的总投后估值（或上市公司市值）超过2000亿美元，则预测为“是”。

claim: Microsoft will bundle AI coding features into Visual Studio / VS Code at no additional charge, putting pricing pressure on the entire market, by end of 2027
reasoning: Microsoft's playbook has always been to bundle developer tools into its platform. With Copilot already integrated into VS Code, the natural move is to include basic AI coding features in the standard (free) tier to drive Azure consumption and undercut competitors.
resolution: Resolves YES if Microsoft offers core AI code completion and chat features in VS Code for free (not requiring a separate Copilot subscription) by end of 2027.
claim_zh: 到2027年底，微软将把AI编码功能免费捆绑到Visual Studio / VS Code中，从而给整个市场带来定价压力。
reasoning_zh: 微软的策略一直是将其开发者工具捆绑到其平台中。鉴于Copilot已集成到VS Code中，自然而然的举动是将基本的AI编码功能包含在标准（免费）层中，以推动Azure消费并削弱竞争对手。
resolution_zh: 如果到2027年底，微软在VS Code中免费提供核心AI代码补全和聊天功能（无需单独的Copilot订阅），则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2029, at least one non-tech Fortune 100 company (bank, insurer, retailer) will build and open-source an AI coding tool that gains >10K GitHub stars
reasoning: Large enterprises have the engineering talent and the domain-specific codebases to train specialized coding models. However, the organizational incentive to open-source such tools is weak, and most enterprises prefer to buy rather than build developer tools.
resolution: Resolves YES if a Fortune 100 company outside the tech sector releases an open-source AI coding tool or model that achieves >10K GitHub stars by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，至少一家非科技类的财富100强公司（银行、保险公司、零售商）将开发并开源一个获得超过1万个GitHub星标的AI编码工具。
reasoning_zh: 大型企业拥有工程人才和领域特定的代码库来训练专门的编码模型。然而，组织开源此类工具的动机较弱，大多数企业更倾向于购买而非自行开发开发者工具。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，一家非科技行业的财富100强公司发布了一个开源AI编码工具或模型，并获得超过1万个GitHub星标，则预测为“是”。

claim: GPT-5 or its successor will achieve >95% on HumanEval and >80% on SWE-bench Verified within 6 months of release
reasoning: Each GPT generation has shown massive jumps on coding benchmarks. GPT-4 already scored high on HumanEval, and the trend line suggests the next frontier model will saturate simpler benchmarks while making strong gains on harder ones.
resolution: Resolves YES if the next major OpenAI model after GPT-4o (whatever it is named) achieves >95% on HumanEval and >80% on SWE-bench Verified within 6 months of public release.
claim_zh: GPT-5或其后续模型将在发布后6个月内，在HumanEval上达到超过95%的得分，并在SWE-bench Verified上达到超过80%的得分。
reasoning_zh: 每一代GPT模型都在编码基准测试上展现出巨大的飞跃。GPT-4已在HumanEval上取得高分，趋势线表明下一个前沿模型将饱和更简单的基准测试，同时在更难的测试中取得显著进展。
resolution_zh: 如果GPT-4o之后的下一个主要的OpenAI模型（无论其名称为何）在公开发布后6个月内，在HumanEval上达到超过95%的得分，并在SWE-bench Verified上达到超过80%的得分，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2028, AI will be able to autonomously maintain a medium-complexity open-source project (>10K LoC, >100 issues/year) with minimal human intervention
reasoning: Autonomous project maintenance requires understanding user intent from issue reports, navigating complex codebases, avoiding regressions, and making design decisions. Current agents can fix isolated bugs but struggle with the holistic judgment that maintenance demands.
resolution: Resolves YES if an AI system autonomously resolves >70% of issues (bug fixes, feature requests, dependency updates) on a public GitHub project with >10K LoC and >100 issues/year, sustained for >6 months, with <10% of its PRs reverted, by end of 2028.
last_evidence: Kitchen Loop demonstrates an LLM agent autonomously producing over a thousand zero-regression PRs to evolve codebases
claim_zh: 到2028年，AI将能够在最少人工干预的情况下，自主维护一个中等复杂度的开源项目（代码行数>1万，每年问题数>100）。
reasoning_zh: 自主项目维护需要从问题报告中理解用户意图、驾驭复杂的代码库、避免回归以及做出设计决策。当前的代理可以修复孤立的错误，但在维护所需的整体判断力方面仍面临挑战。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，一个AI系统在一个代码行数超过1万且每年问题数超过100的公共GitHub项目上，自主解决了超过70%的问题（错误修复、功能请求、依赖更新），并持续超过6个月，且其拉取请求（PR）被回滚的比例低于10%，则预测为“是”。

claim: Multimodal AI coding tools that accept screenshots, diagrams, and voice input will capture >25% of the AI coding tool market by 2029
reasoning: Multimodal input is a natural evolution for coding tools — designers can screenshot UIs, PMs can sketch architectures, and developers can voice-describe changes. But text-based interaction has deep inertia in developer workflows, and multimodal adds latency.
resolution: Resolves YES if AI coding tools with multimodal input (beyond text/code) capture >25% market share by revenue or MAU per a credible analyst report by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，接受截图、图表和语音输入的多模态AI编码工具将占据AI编码工具市场超过25%的份额。
reasoning_zh: 多模态输入是编码工具的自然演进——设计师可以截取UI，产品经理可以绘制架构草图，开发者可以语音描述变更。但基于文本的交互在开发者工作流程中具有深厚的惯性，且多模态会增加延迟。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，根据可靠的分析师报告，具有多模态输入（超越文本/代码）的AI编码工具在收入或月活跃用户（MAU）方面占据超过25%的市场份额，则预测为“是”。

claim: The cost per token for frontier coding models will drop by >90% between 2025 and 2028
reasoning: API pricing has already fallen dramatically (GPT-4 pricing dropped >10x in 18 months). Competition between providers, hardware improvements, distillation techniques, and efficiency gains virtually guarantee continued steep price declines.
resolution: Resolves YES if the per-token API price for a frontier-quality coding model (comparable to best-in-class 2025 performance) is <10% of the January 2025 price for GPT-4 Turbo or Claude 3.5 Sonnet by end of 2028.
last_evidence: The breakthrough in KV cache video compression dramatically lowers memory footprints, heavily supporting a massive drop in the cost per token for AI models.
claim_zh: 2025年至2028年间，前沿编码模型的每token成本将下降超过90%。
reasoning_zh: API定价已大幅下降（GPT-4定价在18个月内下降超过10倍）。供应商之间的竞争、硬件改进、蒸馏技术和效率提升几乎保证了价格将持续大幅下降。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，一个前沿质量编码模型（性能与2025年最佳模型相当）的每token API价格低于2025年1月GPT-4 Turbo或Claude 3.5 Sonnet价格的10%，则预测为“是”。

claim: The EU will pass binding regulation requiring disclosure of AI-generated code in safety-critical software (aviation, medical devices, autonomous vehicles) by 2029
reasoning: The EU AI Act already establishes risk categories for AI systems. Extending disclosure requirements to AI-generated code in high-risk domains is a natural regulatory evolution. The EU has consistently led on tech regulation.
resolution: Resolves YES if the EU adopts binding regulation (not just guidance) requiring organizations to disclose or document use of AI-generated code in safety-critical software by end of 2029.
claim_zh: 到2029年，欧盟将通过具有约束力的法规，要求在安全关键型软件（航空、医疗设备、自动驾驶汽车）中披露AI生成代码的使用情况。
reasoning_zh: 欧盟AI法案已为AI系统建立了风险类别。将披露要求扩展到高风险领域中的AI生成代码是监管的自然演进。欧盟在科技监管方面一直处于领先地位。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，欧盟通过具有约束力的法规（而非仅仅指导方针），要求组织在安全关键型软件中披露或记录AI生成代码的使用情况，则预测为“是”。

claim: The EU's AI coding regulations will cause >20% of European startups to relocate or incorporate engineering teams outside the EU by 2030
reasoning: Regulatory burden may drive some startups away, but the EU market is too large to abandon. Most companies will comply rather than relocate. The 20% threshold is extremely high — even GDPR didn't cause that level of flight.
resolution: Resolves YES if credible reporting or startup surveys show >20% of EU-founded tech startups have moved primary engineering operations outside the EU specifically citing AI code regulations by end of 2030.
claim_zh: 到2030年，欧盟的AI编码法规将导致超过20%的欧洲初创公司将工程团队迁出欧盟或在欧盟以外注册。
reasoning_zh: 监管负担可能会驱使一些初创公司离开，但欧盟市场太大，不容放弃。大多数公司会选择遵守而非搬迁。20%的门槛极高——即使是GDPR也未导致如此大规模的出走。
resolution_zh: 如果到2030年底，可靠报告或初创公司调查显示，超过20%的欧盟成立的科技初创公司已将其主要工程业务迁出欧盟，并明确指出是由于AI代码法规，则预测为“是”。

claim: By 2030, India will have a domestically-developed AI coding tool in the global top 10 by revenue
reasoning: India has a massive developer base and growing AI talent, but its AI ecosystem lags the US and China in foundation model development. Government initiatives and the domestic market size provide opportunity, but building a globally competitive tool from India remains challenging.
resolution: Resolves YES if an AI coding tool developed by an India-headquartered company ranks in the global top 10 by revenue per credible analyst report by end of 2030.
claim_zh: 到2030年，印度将拥有一款由国内开发的AI编码工具，其收入位列全球前十。
reasoning_zh: 印度拥有庞大的开发者基础和不断增长的AI人才，但其AI生态系统在基础模型开发方面落后于美国和中国。政府倡议和国内市场规模提供了机会，但从印度打造一个具有全球竞争力的工具仍然充满挑战。
resolution_zh: 如果到2030年底，根据可靠的分析师报告，由印度总部公司开发的AI编码工具在收入方面位列全球前十，则预测为“是”。

claim: US-China AI export controls will fragment the AI coding tool market into two incompatible ecosystems by 2029
reasoning: Export controls are tightening, and China is building independent AI infrastructure. But coding tools are software, not hardware — fragmentation requires active blocking of tool access, not just chip restrictions. VPNs and cloud routing may prevent full fragmentation.
resolution: Resolves YES if by end of 2029, the top 3 AI coding tools used in China share zero overlap with the top 3 used in the US, and developers cannot easily use tools from the other ecosystem, per usage data or developer surveys.
last_evidence: Cursor’s reliance on a Chinese foundation model creating severe compliance hurdles highlights growing geopolitical friction that could fragment the AI tooling market.
claim_zh: 到2029年，中美AI出口管制将把AI编码工具市场分裂成两个不兼容的生态系统。
reasoning_zh: 出口管制正在收紧，中国正在建设独立的AI基础设施。但编码工具是软件而非硬件——分裂需要主动阻止工具访问，而不仅仅是芯片限制。VPN和云路由可能会阻止完全分裂。
resolution_zh: 如果到2029年底，根据使用数据或开发者调查，中国使用的前三大AI编码工具与美国使用的前三大工具完全没有重叠，并且开发者无法轻松使用对方生态系统中的工具，则预测为“是”。

claim: By end of 2026, at least 3 Y Combinator batch companies will ship products built entirely by AI coding agents with <100 lines of human-written code
reasoning: YC is already seeing founders who use AI agents for nearly all coding. The barrier is not capability but willingness to trust AI-generated code for a production startup. Some founders will embrace this fully as a competitive advantage in speed.
resolution: Resolves YES if 3+ companies from YC batches in 2026 publicly state or are credibly reported to have built their initial product with <100 lines of human-authored code, the rest being AI-generated.
claim_zh: 到2026年底，至少有3家Y Combinator孵化公司将发布完全由AI编码代理构建的产品，其中人工编写的代码少于100行。
reasoning_zh: YC已经看到有创始人几乎所有编码都使用AI代理。障碍不在于能力，而在于是否愿意信任AI生成的代码用于生产级初创公司。一些创始人将完全接受这一点，将其视为速度上的竞争优势。
resolution_zh: 如果2026年Y Combinator批次中，有3家或更多公司公开声明或被可靠报道称其初始产品的人工编写代码少于100行，其余部分由AI生成，则预测为“是”。
last_evidence: Kitchen Loop firmly validates spec-driven, zero-authoring development paradigms for complete applications

claim: By 2028, 'AI debugging' specialists — engineers who primarily diagnose and fix AI-generated code — will be a recognized job category at >10 major tech companies
reasoning: While AI-generated code does need debugging, it is unlikely to become a standalone job category. Debugging AI code requires the same skills as debugging human code. Companies are more likely to fold this into existing SRE or quality engineering roles than create a new category.
resolution: Resolves YES if >10 companies with >5000 employees have a distinct job title or team specifically for diagnosing/fixing AI-generated code issues, per job postings or company org disclosures, by end of 2028.
claim_zh: 到2028年，“AI调试”专家——主要诊断和修复AI生成代码的工程师——将在超过10家主要科技公司中成为一个公认的职位类别。
reasoning_zh: 尽管AI生成代码确实需要调试，但它不太可能成为一个独立的职位类别。调试AI代码需要与调试人工代码相同的技能。公司更可能将其纳入现有的SRE或质量工程角色，而非创建一个新类别。
resolution_zh: 如果到2028年底，根据招聘信息或公司组织披露，超过10家拥有5000名以上员工的公司设有专门用于诊断/修复AI生成代码问题的独立职位名称或团队，则预测为“是”。

claim: At least one AI coding tool will achieve >80% on SWE-bench Verified by April 30, 2026
claim_zh: 至少一个AI编程工具将在2026年4月30日前在SWE-bench Verified上达到>80%
reasoning: Current best is ~72% as of March 2026. Rapid progress trajectory but the 80% threshold is a significant jump from 72%.
reasoning_zh: 截至2026年3月最高约72%。进步轨迹很快，但从72%到80%是一个显著的跳跃。
resolution: Resolves YES if any AI system scores >80% on the SWE-bench Verified leaderboard by April 30, 2026.
resolution_zh: 如果任何AI系统在2026年4月30日前在SWE-bench Verified排行榜上得分>80%，则判定为YES。

claim: Anthropic will release a new Claude model (Claude 4 or equivalent) before May 15, 2026
claim_zh: Anthropic将在2026年5月15日前发布新的Claude模型（Claude 4或同等级）
reasoning: Anthropic has been on roughly quarterly release cadence. Claude Opus 4.6 launched early 2026. A new frontier model seems likely within this window.
reasoning_zh: Anthropic大约保持季度发布节奏。Claude Opus 4.6于2026年初发布。在此窗口期内发布新前沿模型的可能性较大。
resolution: Resolves YES if Anthropic publicly launches a model described as a major new release (not a minor update) before May 15, 2026.
resolution_zh: 如果Anthropic在2026年5月15日前公开发布被描述为重大新版本的模型，则判定为YES。

claim: GitHub will announce changes to Copilot pricing or tiers before June 1, 2026
claim_zh: GitHub将在2026年6月1日前宣布Copilot定价或层级变更
reasoning: GitHub has already moved to metered billing. Competition from Cursor and Claude Code is intensifying. More pricing changes are likely.
reasoning_zh: GitHub已转向按量计费。来自Cursor和Claude Code的竞争正在加剧。更多定价变更可能性较大。
resolution: Resolves YES if GitHub announces any change to Copilot pricing, plans, or billing structure before June 1, 2026.
resolution_zh: 如果GitHub在2026年6月1日前宣布任何Copilot定价、计划或计费结构变更，则判定为YES。

claim: At least 3 new AI coding startups will announce >0M funding rounds in April 2026
claim_zh: 至少3家新的AI编程初创公司将在2026年4月宣布>5000万美元融资轮
reasoning: AI coding is the hottest VC category. Multiple startups are reportedly in late-stage fundraising. But >0M for 3+ in a single month is a high bar.
reasoning_zh: AI编程是最热门的VC类别。多家初创公司据报道正在进行后期融资。但一个月内3家以上获得>5000万美元是一个较高的门槛。
resolution: Resolves YES if 3+ AI coding tool startups announce 0M+ funding rounds in April 2026, per Crunchbase or TechCrunch reports.
resolution_zh: 如果根据Crunchbase或TechCrunch报道，3家以上AI编程工具初创公司在2026年4月宣布5000万美元以上融资轮，则判定为YES。

claim: The next major arXiv paper on AI code generation will report >75% on HumanEval+ before April 20, 2026
claim_zh: 下一篇关于AI代码生成的重大arXiv论文将在2026年4月20日前报告HumanEval+上>75%的成绩
reasoning: The benchmark pace has been accelerating. Multiple labs are working on code models. A >75% HumanEval+ result seems achievable.
reasoning_zh: 基准测试进展速度一直在加快。多个实验室正在研究代码模型。达到HumanEval+ 75%以上的结果似乎是可实现的。
resolution: Resolves YES if an arXiv paper published before April 20 reports >75% on HumanEval+ (extended version) for a single model.
resolution_zh: 如果在4月20日前发布的arXiv论文报告单个模型在HumanEval+上>75%，则判定为YES。
